sqlReaderQuery.value:
select 
'@{pipeline().DataFactory}' as DatafactoryName,
'@{pipeline().Pipeline}' as PipelineName,
'@{pipeline().RunId}' as PipelineRunId,
'empnames' as SourceTable,
'Dest_emp_files' as TargetTable,
'@{activity('Copy_acitivity').Status}' as Status,
'@{activity('Copy_acitivity').output.errors[0].Code}' as code,
'@{activity('Copy_acitivity').output.errors[0].Message,'''',''}' as error_message
